title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at ABB India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at ABB India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ABB India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!
